underlying_goal: Complete project delivery workflow: run status check, execute test suite, fix failing tests, and deliver/release v1.0.0 of an AI desktop application to GitHub
brief_summary: User ran ultra-status, ultra-test, and ultra-deliver commands to finalize and release v1.0.0 of their AI desktop app to GitHub; all steps completed successfully with 943/943 tests passing and the repo pushed to GitHub.
